features: Built on v4.0.1 Agency Job Board and the separate v4 marketplace foundation
Added Platform Admin Client Approval Center sidebar tab
Added pending, approved, rejected, and all client application tabs
Added client application detail rail with contact info, notes, submitted date, and active-client state
Added Accept Client and Reject Client actions for Platform Admin
Accept Client activates/creates the client record and unlocks client portal login
Client approval sets role and marketplace_role to client so v4 marketplace routing is clear
Client approvals no longer hide only inside the legacy Clients page
Kept marketplace_jobs as the source of truth for future client patrol requests
No payments, Stripe, subscriptions, bidding, rankings, or auto-matching added
Preserved v4.0.1 agency available/accepted/declined job board flow
